title: Araiostegia decurrens
taxonomy: Araiostegia decurrens is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is a member of the tribe Gnaphalieae. Within this tribe, Araiostegia decurrens is classified as a part of the subtribe Gnaphaliinae. The plant is native to Australia, where it grows in dry to subhumid areas. It is a shrub-like plant with small, white to yellowish flowers.
